title: [release-1.26] Bump runc up to 1.2.9 for CVE-2025-52881, CVE-2025-31133 and CVE-2025-52565
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Backport PR #6484 & #6511

#### How to verify it

CI + Manual

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:
(Copied from #6540)

The commits in this PR were created **with the assistance of AI**, from https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6540.  When reviewing please pay special attention to the `Bump runc to v1.2.9` commit.  I've included a summary in the commit message detailing the substantial changes WRT the source 6540 PR.

Look closely at:

* The **Backport release-1.27 Fix linter errors** commit.  That one involved a combination of manual + AI assisted code adjustments.

* The **Workaround builder.Run() unwrapable exit code** commit was almost entirely Clanker-generated.  I vaguely understand the purpose, but didn't spend much time digging into details.  I instructed the agent to match 1.27 as near as possible.

I believe the other backport commits from 1.27 were mostly straight-forward.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

> As in https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6538 you seem to be missing: https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/3f365a394da258a3a97680ab4bae76f3dfc7e97d
>
> Which, surprisingly, doesn't seem to be deadly to the tests. We may need to reviist and add later if Podman goes south.

I'm going to backport this.
force-push: Injected backport of "Partially work around containers/common" commit.

:thinking: realizing I backported the code, but not the `util_test.go` test for `TestCause`.

Edit: Ref: [Workaround builder.Run() unwrapable exit code](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6570/commits/4ae39d828edede3e43208fa5625b5ca23f9e03ec)
Re-ran "Integration fedora-41 crun w/ vfs" - networking flake.
Re-ran again, different test had a networking flake :disappointed:
Oof, and yet again re-run with yet another flake.
Note: The "[Partially work around containers/common]" commit is missing from the changelog :disappointed:

> Note: The "[Partially work around containers/common]" commit is missing from the changelog 😞

Clarification: The commit is here, I just neglected to update the changelog.
Ref: Previously all-green (passing) tests prior to the changelog update: https://github.com/containers/buildah/runs/57679119197
